requirement_topic.en: Market access entry structure — API-U / NIB, in-country importer, and entry points
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入结构——API-U / NIB、在地进口商与入境口岸
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入結構——API-U / NIB、在地進口商與入境口岸

summary.en: Most practical China-to-Indonesia export flows for batteries use an Indonesian importer with API-U or NIB based licensing/registration responsibilities as the legal market-facing party. The importer supports customs clearance and local filing, and is typically the responsible entity for mandatory product mark and declaration obligations. Import pathways for consumer electronics commonly clear at Tanjung Priok (Jakarta) or Tanjung Perak (Surabaya). Energy appliances under domestic rules can additionally need ESDM energy labels for compliance, with electrical characteristics aligned to 230 V and 50 Hz usage context.
summary.zh: 锂电池等出口到印尼的实际流程通常由持有 API-U 或 NIB 责任框架的印尼进口商承担，在清关和本地报关文件中作为市场面对方。进口商通常也是强制标识和申报义务的责任主体。家电类消费电子常见进出口口岸为雅加达 Tanjung Priok 或泗水 Tanjung Perak。若产品属于能源标签范围，还需按 ESDM 要求处理能源标签与 230 V、50 Hz 的电参数适配说明。
summary.zht: 鋰電池等出口到印尼的實際流程通常由持有 API-U 或 NIB 責任框架的印尼進口商承擔，在清關和本地報關文件中作為面向市場的一方。進口商通常也是強制標識和申報義務的責任主體。家電類消費電子常見進出口口岸為雅加達 Tanjung Priok 或泗水 Tanjung Perak。若產品屬能源標籤範圍，仍需按 ESDM 要求處理能源標籤與 230 V、50 Hz 電參數適配說明。

standards_or_laws: Indonesian business registration and import responsibility framework using API-U / NIB models for import operations
Kementerian Perdagangan and customs filing expectations for goods requiring national mark and declaration
Energy performance labeling requirements for appliance-class products under ESDM-linked programs
Customs entry and logistics expectations at major ports including Tanjung Priok and Tanjung Perak

summary.en: China generally requires importer registration for domestic tax and customs filing, but not an API-U or NIB model equivalent structured for a third-country destination market. Chinese export documents usually cover domestic filing and customs export procedures only; local Indonesian clearance responsibilities remain destination-specific and are not automatically transferred from China-side registration.
summary.zh: 中国通常要求进口方在国内税务和海关环节具备注册与备案，但没有面向目标国市场的 API-U 或 NIB 同类结构。中国出口文件通常覆盖国内报关、出口单证和国内税务流程，印尼端的清关责任不自动由中国侧注册承担。
summary.zht: 中國通常要求進口方在國內稅務和海關環節具備註冊與備案，但沒有面向目標國市場的 API-U 或 NIB 同類結構。中國出口文件通常覆蓋國內報關、出口單證和國內稅務流程，印尼端的清關責任不自動由中國側註冊承擔。

standards_or_laws: PRC customs and export declaration requirements
China tax, foreign trade, and customs agency frameworks for outbound export shipments

gap.en: The main Indonesia-specific gap is the legal market-facing importer model. A Chinese exporter must coordinate with a licensed Indonesia-side importer or responsible representative tied to API-U/NIB responsibilities for customs filing, local labeling, and post-market accountability. For appliance-class products, energy-labeling and power-parameter framing at 230 V, 50 Hz may need additional local-facing evidence. Port-level logistics planning should include Tanjung Priok or Tanjung Perak entry assumptions.
gap.zh: 印尼特有差距主要在市场面对方的法律模型。中国出口商必须与具备 API-U/NIB 责任边界的印尼本地进口商或代表方协作完成清关、标签和售后监管责任。对于家电类产品，能源标签及 230 V、50 Hz 的电参数说明可能需要额外提交本地文件。物流规划中应明确以 Tanjung Priok 或 Tanjung Perak 作为主要入境口岸假设。
gap.zht: 印尼特有差距主要在市場面向方的法律模型。中國出口商必須與具備 API-U/NIB 責任邊界的印尼本地進口商或代表方協作完成清關、標籤和售後監管責任。對於家電類產品，能源標籤及 230 V、50 Hz 的電參數說明可能需要額外提交本地文件。物流規劃中應明確以 Tanjung Priok 或 Tanjung Perak 作為主要入境口岸假設。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for practical market access. Most products rely on an in-country importer or responsible party for API-U/NIB-linked filing and customs interaction, plus label/declaration obligations where applicable.
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic import registration is mandatory for Chinese customs operations but no NIB/API-U equivalent applies as a replacement for Indonesian destination-side importer obligations.

source.publisher: Kementerian Perindustrian Republik Indonesia and trading/import administration channels

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Indonesia's importer-facing compliance is destination-specific and not duplicated by China-side export filing alone. Plan for API-U / NIB style responsibility allocation with a local Indonesian entity, ensure mark and declaration readiness, and align energy-label claims to 230 V, 50 Hz context where the product falls into appliance scope. The common entry points are Tanjung Priok and Tanjung Perak for practical logistics execution.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚面向进口商的准入要求属于目的地专有，不能由中国端单独出口报关替代。应按 API-U / NIB 式的责任分配联动本地进出口主体，确保标识和申报材料就位，并在产品属于家电范围时按 230 V、50 Hz 情景对齐能源标签。实际物流上常见入境口岸为 Tanjung Priok 和 Tanjung Perak。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞面向進口商的准入要求屬於目的地專有，不能由中國端單獨出口報關替代。應按 API-U / NIB 式的責任分配聯動本地進出口主體，確保標識和申報資料就位，並在產品屬於家電範圍時按 230 V、50 Hz 情境對齊能源標籤。實際物流上常見入境口岸為 Tanjung Priok 和 Tanjung Perak。
